name: Kasen International Holdings Limited
summary: Kasen International Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and sells upholstered furniture in the United States, the People's Republic of China, Europe, and internationally. It operates through Manufacturing, Properties Development, and Others segments. The company produces and sells sofas, dining chairs, and other furniture products; and glass fiber reinforced plastic products. It also develops properties; operates resorts; and provides property management and tourism resort-related services. In addition, the company engages in the operation of a restaurant and hotel, waterpark, and provision of travel-related services; wood processing activities; and trading of leather products, as well as paper making business. Kasen International Holdings Limited was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Haining, the People's Republic of China.
